title: Apparatus for treating laundry
abstract: An apparatus for treating laundry includes a tub, a drum, a motor configured to rotate the drum, a rotation shaft coupled to the motor, a first body including a first body hub located at a rotational center of the drum and fixed to the drum and a first body arm extended from the first body hub toward an edge of the drum, a second body including a second body hub located in the tub and fixed to the rotation shaft and a second body arm extended from the second body hub toward the first body arm, a connecting part connecting the first body to the second body and defining a space between the first body and the second body, and a reinforcement rib extended from the connecting part along the first body arm to connect the connecting part to the first body arm or the second body arm.
claims: 1. An apparatus for treating laundry, comprising: a tub that defines a space configured to receive water therein; a drum that has a cylindrical shape and is configured to rotate within the tub, the drum defining a space configured to receive the laundry therein; a motor configured to provide power to rotate the drum; a rotation shaft coupled to the motor and configured to transmit the power from the motor; and a connector configured to transmit the power of the motor to the drum, wherein the connector comprises: a hub having the rotation shaft fixed thereto, and a plurality of arms projected from the hub toward an edge of the drum, and wherein a thickness of at least one of the plurality of arms increases as the at least one of the plurality of arms extends from the edge of the drum to the hub, wherein the plurality of arms comprise: a first body arm that is fixed to the drum and extends from the hub toward the edge of the drum, a second body arm to which the rotation shaft is fixed, the second body arm being spaced apart from the first body arm and extending from the hub toward the edge of the drum, and a connecting part that connects the first body arm and the second body arm to each other and maintains a state that the first body arm and the second body arm are spaced apart from each other, and wherein the hub comprises: a first body hub located at a rotation center of the drum and fixed to the drum, the first body hub defining a first hub hole perforated along the rotation center, wherein the first body arm extends from the first body hub, a second body hub that is located within the tub and has the rotation shaft fixed thereto, the second body hub defining a second hub hole perforated along the rotation center, wherein the second body arm extends from the second body hub and faces the first body arm, and a circumferential rib that connects the first body hub and the second body hub to each other.
